DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-19-2024 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT ATLASSIAN CORPORATION, ATLASSIAN US, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendants' demurrer to the complaint is sustained with leave to amend. Even by California's liberal pleading standards, the complaint is too skimpy. For example, the 14-line "factual background" is actually a laundry list of legal concepts - bereft of facts and names - that could apply to most any employment case. (Cmplt. 2:22-3:9; CCP 425.10(a)(1) ["statement of facts" required].)

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-30-2024 Continued To Nov-19-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT ATLASSIAN CORPORATION, ATLASSIAN US, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling with a modification, as follows:

Continued for noncompliance with Local Rule 2.7(B) (courtesy copies).

Per the parties' agreed-upon request via email, the Court permits this matter to be continued to November 19, 2024 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302.

Courtesy copies to be delivered to the department should refer to the new hearing date.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
